commands.summary: Shared field, table, filter/search, live-region, semantic-token, 44px, and reduced-motion contracts passed within the focused 63-test run.
7 passed and 5 failed. Failures record the intentionally missing mobile native-dialog trigger/behavior and 1023/1024 shell switch. T019 remains red until T046-T049 and T112.

notes: Semantic state CSS variables are generated from src/lib/design-system/tokens.ts through the Tailwind base plugin; globals.css contains no duplicated state hex values.
Caller-provided ARIA descriptions and error-message references remain intact when component-owned errors are absent.
RTL logical spacing and reduced-motion-safe loading are covered by unit contracts; shell convergence remains T019 expected-red.
